sprints.title: AgentForge v6.5.1 — Real Execute Phase & tmpdir Test Isolation

items.title: Real execute phase — spawn claude -p with --allowed-tools
items.description: Replace the stubbed execute phase handler with a real implementation that spawns claude -p with --allowed-tools Read,Write,Edit,Bash,Glob,Grep for each sprint item. The execute agent receives the item description as its task prompt and modifies real source files. Commits: 0474ade, 0bf01b4.

items.title: Rewrite integration tests to use os.tmpdir() workspaces
items.description: Replace the TEST_POLLUTION_PATTERNS workaround with proper test isolation using temporary directories (os.tmpdir()). Each test creates its own workspace and cleans up on teardown, eliminating cross-test file pollution. Commit: 042f261.

successCriteria: Execute phase spawns real claude -p agents with file-editing tools
Sprint items are resolved by actual code changes, not stubs
Integration tests run in isolated tmpdir workspaces with no cross-test pollution
